ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot making a definitive "X" with its arms, conveying a sense of cancellation, denial, or prohibition.  The movement will start with arms at the sides, then transition to a clear "X" formation, and finally return to the resting position.  The animation will emphasize the sharp, decisive nature of the "X" gesture.  This is similar to the single-frame T-pose, but with a more dynamic and expressive motion.

frames.beat: arms hang straight down, ready to cross
arms sweep out wide to form a sharp X
arms return to a neutral, resting pose
